settings.headline: Stop Letting the Weather Decide When You Do Laundry.
settings.subheadline: Nuracom's smart drying technology dries your clothes indoors in hours, not days — using turbo-fan airflow that costs under $1 per use. No dryer. No weather app. No stress. Real Cost Savings too! See below.

settings.heading: Your Tumble Dryer Is Quietly Costing You Hundreds Every Year
settings.subheading: We ran the numbers using real product specs and the current Australian average electricity rate of ~36c/kWh. Here's what most families never calculate.
settings.dryer_capacity_text:
Capacity: ~7–8 kg per load
A family of 4 averages 6 dryer loads/week
settings.nuracom_capacity_text:
Capacity: up to 35 kg
That's ~5 dryer loads in 2–3 rack loads
settings.capacity_note_headline: The capacity difference is the real game-changer
settings.capacity_note_text: A standard tumble dryer holds 7–8 kg per load. A Nuracom holds up to 35–45 kg depending on model — meaning the same weekly laundry that takes 6 dryer cycles can be handled in just 2–3 Nuracom cycles. Fewer cycles = dramatically less energy, even before you factor in the lower wattage.
settings.savings_headline: Save $354+ per year on energy alone
settings.savings_sub: That's $443 in dryer costs vs just $89 with Nuracom. Your system pays for itself — then keeps saving you money every year after.
settings.savings_note: Based on the current Australian average electricity rate of ~36c/kWh (source: Canstar, CHOICE). Tumble dryer: standard vented model at ~4 kWh per load (source: CHOICE Australia). Nuracom: 800W rated, 2-hour auto shut-off cycle. Capacity based on the Nuracom Aero (35 kg); Stratos holds up to 45 kg. A family of 4 averaging ~48 kg of laundry per week (~3 Nuracom cycles vs 6 dryer loads) is used for load calculations.

settings.title: Your Laundry Schedule Is Controlled by the Weather
settings.description: You check the forecast before every wash. You rearrange your day around drying windows. And when rain hits mid-dry, you're rewashing a full load that now smells like damp towels. Your time is being stolen by something completely out of your control.
settings.quote: I'm so sick of planning my entire week around whether it's going to rain.

settings.title: The Dryer Costs a Fortune (And Ruins Your Clothes)
settings.description: At $2–$3 per load, your tumble dryer is quietly draining hundreds of dollars a year. And the clothes it doesn't shrink, it fades. You're paying premium prices for a machine that actively damages your wardrobe. That's not a solution — it's a tax on bad weather.
settings.quote: The dryer shrunk my favourite jumper and I'm still annoyed about it. But what choice do I have?

settings.title: Damp Clothes, Damp House, Damp Mood
settings.description: Clothes draped over every surface. A clothes horse blocking the hallway. That faint musty smell that never quite leaves. Indoor drying without a proper system doesn't just look bad — it's creating humidity that feeds mould, triggers allergies, and makes your home uncomfortable.
settings.quote: Our apartment looks like a refugee camp half the week with clothes hanging everywhere.

settings.headline: Three models. Save thousands.
settings.subheading: Real 5-year savings vs a tumble dryer for households of every size — based on actual cost-per-cycle and load capacity.

settings.headline: What if drying clothes indoors was actually solved?
settings.text_1: Not managed. Not tolerated. Not worked around with cheap racks and crossed fingers.
settings.text_2: What if there was a system that dried your clothes in hours — every time, rain or shine — using less power than a light bulb? A system you could mount once, operate with one touch, and never think about again?
settings.answer_sub: And the technology behind it is simpler than you'd expect.

settings.title: Turbo-Fan Forced Airflow
settings.text_1: Unlike passive racks that rely on still air to slowly evaporate moisture, Nuracom uses up to 6 ultra-silent turbo fans to force a constant stream of air through your garments. This mimics nature's most effective drying method — a steady breeze — but indoors, on demand, regardless of what's happening outside.
settings.text_2: The result is dramatically faster drying without the heat damage of a tumble dryer. Your delicates stay intact. Your colours stay true. And your clothes are dry in hours, not days. All while being perfectly flat. No ironing required.
settings.highlight_text: Key difference: Forced airflow dries clothes up to 2x faster than passive air drying, while using a fraction of the energy of a tumble dryer.

settings.title: Ceiling-Mount Heat Capture
settings.text_1: Hot air rises. It's basic physics, and Nuracom uses it to your advantage. When your rack lifts to ceiling height with one touch, your clothes sit in the warmest zone of any room — where temperatures can be 3–5°C higher than floor level.
settings.text_2: Combined with the turbo-fan airflow, this creates an optimal drying environment that works with your home's natural convection currents. No extra heating needed. No energy wasted. Just smart engineering.
settings.highlight_text: Key difference: Ceiling mounting utilises wasted warm air that already exists in your home, eliminating the need for energy-hungry heating elements.

settings.title: UV Disinfection & Hygiene Control
settings.text_1: Drying clothes isn't just about removing moisture — it's about making them genuinely clean. Nuracom's UV disinfection system (Aero and Stratos models) eliminates bacteria and odour-causing microorganisms during the drying process. The Stratos goes even further with negative ion technology that actively removes dust mites.
settings.text_2: This means your clothes come off the rack not just dry, but hygienically clean. No musty smell. No hidden bacteria. Just fresh, ready-to-wear clothing, every single time.
settings.highlight_text: Key difference: UV disinfection and negative ion tech mean your clothes are cleaner coming off a Nuracom than out of most tumble dryers.

settings.heading: How Nuracom Dries Clothes 2x Faster — Without Heat Damage
settings.subheading: Three engineering innovations working together to create the fastest, most efficient indoor drying system ever built for Australian homes.

settings.heading: Choose Your Nuracom
settings.subheading: Three models. One guarantee: a perfect dry, every time.

settings.title: Mark & Mount the Brackets
settings.description: Use the included template to mark your ceiling. Drill, plug, and secure the mounting brackets. Takes about 10 minutes.

settings.title: Attach the Main Unit
settings.description: Click the drying rack unit into the brackets. The obstruction-sensing system auto-calibrates as soon as it's powered on.

settings.title: Plug In & Connect
settings.description: Standard Australian power outlet. Download the Nuracom app, pair via Bluetooth, and you're ready to go. One-touch operation from day one.

settings.heading: Install It Yourself in Under 30 Minutes
settings.body_text: No tradesperson needed. No complicated wiring. Just a few basic tools and our step-by-step guide. If you can hang a shelf, you can install a Nuracom.
settings.guarantee_text: Full video walkthrough included with every purchase, plus a detailed printed manual. Our support team is also available if you need any help.

settings.heading: Join Hundreds of Families Who've Made the Switch

settings.question: How fast does it actually dry clothes?
settings.answer:
Most typical loads are dry within 2 hours. A traditional tumble dryer runs a full cycle in 60–90 minutes, so the time difference is smaller than most people assume — and because Nuracom dries clothes hanging (not tumbling), your clothes come off the rack dry AND flat.

You get the speed of a dryer and the gentleness of a clothesline in one system — no shrinkage, no wrinkles, no ironing. Best of both worlds, without the damage or the $443/year power bill.

settings.question: Will it work with my ceiling type?
settings.answer: Nuracom systems are compatible with standard plasterboard, timber, and concrete ceilings — which covers the vast majority of Australian homes. The mounting brackets are included with every purchase, and our installation guide covers all common ceiling types. If you're unsure, our support team can advise before you buy.

settings.question: How much weight can it hold?
settings.answer: The Breeze holds up to 35kg, the Aero up to 40kg, and the Stratos up to 45kg of wet laundry. To put that in context, a full washing machine load of wet clothes typically weighs 8–12kg — so even the Breeze can handle 2–3 full loads at once. The obstruction sensing system also prevents overloading.

settings.question: Is it noisy?
settings.answer: No. Nuracom uses ultra-silent motors specifically engineered to operate below conversational volume. You can run it while watching TV, sleeping, or working from home without noticing it. This was a non-negotiable design requirement for us — a noisy drying system defeats the purpose of home convenience.

settings.question: Do I really not need a tradesperson to install it?
settings.answer:
Correct — no electrician or tradesperson needed. The system plugs into a standard Australian power outlet and the ceiling mount uses standard bracket fixings (all included).

Every unit ships with a detailed video walkthrough, a printed step-by-step manual, and access to our Australian-based support team if you get stuck at any point. Installation works with standard plasterboard, timber, and concrete ceilings.

If you've ever put up a curtain rod or a shelf, you already have the skills. Most customers complete installation in 20–30 minutes. And if for any reason you're not confident after seeing the instructions, you can return it within our satisfaction window — no hassle.

settings.question: What if I'm not happy with it or something breaks?
settings.answer: We want you to be completely satisfied. Nuracom offers comprehensive warranty coverage (up to 5 years on the motor) T&C apply, available on our website. We pride ourselves in providing responsive Australian customer support. If you have any issues, our team is available to help troubleshoot or arrange service. We stand behind our products because we know they work.

settings.headline: Ready to Never Worry About Drying Laundry Again?
settings.subtext: Join hundreds of Australian families who've permanently solved indoor drying. One purchase. One install. A lifetime of perfect dries.
